title: BorisType Test Suite
description: Configuration file (_suite.json) for a botest test suite

name.description: Human-readable name of the test suite, displayed in test output

tests.description: Map of compiled test file names (.test.js) to their display names

disabled.description: Set to true to skip the entire suite during test runs. Default: false

nodeCheck.description: Set to false to skip the entire suite in Node.js validation (--node-check). Default: true

skipNodeCheck.description: List of test file names (.test.js) to skip in Node.js validation (--node-check). Allows excluding individual tests while keeping the rest of the suite enabled

codeChecks.description: Per-test regex validation rules for compiled output. Keys are compiled test file names (.test.js). Use 'forbid' to ensure patterns do NOT appear and 'require' to ensure patterns DO appear in the generated code

forbid.description: Regex patterns that must NOT match in the compiled code. If any matches, the test fails before execution

require.description: Regex patterns that MUST match in the compiled code. If any does not match, the test fails before execution
